title: Igaram’s Decoy Plan
description: On pages 13–16, igaram’s decoy plan as vivi, Igaram, and the Straw Hats try to survive Baroque Works’ pursuit while the truth about Alabasta comes into focus.
scene: Igaram’s Decoy Plan. Vivi, Igaram, and the Straw Hats try to survive Baroque Works’ pursuit while the truth about Alabasta comes into focus. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: is IGARAM, the head of Alabasta kingdom's Royal Guards! And the second spy...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: tt) note: Igaram's alias, lgarapot literally means lgaram- escape or lgaram- like.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: is none other than Alabama's princess herself,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Y-You were a princess, Ms. Wedn- Essday!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: Now's not the time for this, Mr. 9!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Jeez, some noisy night this is...

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Don't mind me, keep fighting amongst your- selves.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Under the direct orders of our Baroque works' boss,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We shall hereby eliminate you two!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: I may not exactly understand what's going on...

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: But you're still the same comrade-in- arms that I've partnered with for a long time.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: I'll hold them off for you so hurry up and run away, Ms. Wednesday!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Hmph, the only thing that matters to us is the successful completion of our mission.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Such trivial things as compassion for one's comrades will only invite death...

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on igaram’s decoy plan. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
